title: The Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
lines: A Wolf found a sheepskin and wrapped it around him.
In this disguise he mingled with a flock of sheep and was not discovered.
One day the shepherd, wanting a sheep for his dinner, picked up the Wolf in his sheepskin clothing, thinking he was a sheep.
The Wolf was slaughtered with the rest of the flock.
Evil-doers often meet with a fate they do not expect.
